keys.description: Age below which the athlete is considered a minor for consent purposes. Some jurisdictions use 13 (US COPPA), some 16 (GDPR default), some 18 (safeguarding-conservative). Default 16 is EU-conservative. Downstream: minor athletes require guardian-recorded consent; their names are stripped from cross-tenant platform-admin reads; direct-to-athlete communications refuse.
Age at which prior guardian-recorded consents auto-expire + the adult athlete records their own consents. CheckAthleteMinorTurnedAdultJob keys off this + config.athlete.minor_min_age.
How often consents must be re-recorded for GDPR audit-ready evidence. Only active when tenant carries athlete_consent_workflow entitlement.
ReconcileAthleteConsentsJob dispatches reminders at these day-thresholds before consent_recorded_at + 365 days.
Wave 3a: false (soft-warn on consent by non-authorised recorder). Wave 3b: true (hard-fail once AthleteGuardian module + cross-module lookup lands).
Character cap on each medical_* text field. Prevents pathological writes ballooning the audit stream.
Dedicated queue for medical-audit dispatches. Isolated from the normal notifications queue to preserve audit-integrity guarantees.
How long athlete_medical_history rows retain. Aligns with medical-record retention across the platform.
Reads of athlete.current_age_group_id past this age trigger an in-band re-resolution. Normal path: nightly RollAthleteAgeGroupSnapshotJob refreshes.
Days after Athlete.deleted_at at which emergency_contact_* + medical_* fields are redacted.
Days after Athlete.deleted_at at which the row becomes eligible for hard-purge (subject to no downstream references).
Optional purge for graduated (not withdrawn/archived) athletes. Default 0 (off) — most tenants retain graduated athletes indefinitely for alumni relations.
Which recipient groups receive AthleteAgeGroupSnapshotChangedNotification. Options: guardian / athlete / coach / hr / branch_manager. Default is just guardian to avoid noise.
